name: Phantom Thief Celianna
short_description: From the creators of Treasure Hunter Claire and President Yukino, comes a Stealth Action game where you must dodge traps and enemies to steal the treasures of those who would oppress society.
detailed_description:
There are evildoers in every society. Dishonest traders who defraud innocent people of their money. And shameless aristocrats who exploit the poor into starvation.

But there is a group of chivalrous thieves that only targets such criminals. The group is called "Cat's Punch."

In their performance-enhancing suits, the beautiful and elegant women of the group evade through traps and enemies to steal the treasures of those who would oppress society.

From the creators of Treasure Hunter Claire and President Yukino, comes a Stealth Action game brought to you in native English!

Features

  • Various Enemies

  • Various Traps

  • Voiced Main Cast

  • Animation

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
